projectDescription: A Minecraft Fabric client mod that adds a customizable ability system, screen-space visual effects, and mythical creature transformation rendering for servers running the Circle of Imagination plugin.
keyFeatures: Bind up to 6 abilities to customizable keybindings (Z, X, C, V, B, N)
Interactive Ability Wheel (G) supporting up to 16 ability slots
Visual HUD overlay with cooldown timers, glow effects, and pathway color-coding
10 server-triggered screen-space visual effects (vignette, heartbeat, cracks, eyes, glitch, bloodrain, frost, whispers, tunnel, flash)
Custom Fabric payload networking protocol for Paper plugin integration
Fully configurable HUD position, scale, and display options via in-game settings screen
Pathway icon font rendering on item tooltips for ingredient identification
publicApiSurface: CircleOfImaginationClient — mod entry point, static ability state accessors
AbilityUsePayload (C→S) — coi-client:use — activate an ability by ID
AbilityRequestPayload (C→S) — coi-client:request — request available ability list
AbilitiesPayload (S→C) — coi-client:abilities — deliver abilities to client
CooldownPayload (S→C) — coi-client:cooldown — set ability cooldown in ticks
VisualEffectPayload (S→C) — coi-client:effect — trigger/stop a visual effect
ConditionsPayload (S→C) — coi-client:conditions — update beyonder condition state
MythicalCreatureForm interface — getPathwayName(), render(), drawBox(), addVertex()
HudConfig — coi_hud.json settings: hudX, hudYOffset, slotSize, slotSpacing, hudScale, enabled, showKeybinds, showAbilityNames, showGlowEffect
